question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the main chapters or the structural outline of the thesis itself. It only provides a project management timeline (development plan) and the title of the current section.

question: Description
feedback: While the text describes the problem and the relevance of the topic extensively, it fails to describe what each chapter of the thesis will contain or what the research process will entail in terms of written sections.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis is not visible. The reader can understand the research goals and the timeline of tasks, but cannot see the logical flow of the thesis chapters (e.g., Literature Review, Methodology, Results, Conclusion).
